entries.title: Engineering Design Process
entries.content: Define problem → research → brainstorm → prototype → test → improve. Iterative cycle used across mechanical, civil, and software engineering.

entries.title: Stress and Strain
entries.content: Stress = force/area. Strain = deformation/original length. Materials fail beyond yield point; safety factors prevent failure.

entries.title: Electric Circuits
entries.content: Series: same current. Parallel: same voltage across branches. Kirchhoff's laws govern complex circuits.

entries.title: Bridge Types
entries.content: Beam (simple spans), arch (compression), truss (triangles), suspension (cables). Choice depends on span and load.

entries.title: Thermodynamics First Law
entries.content: Energy cannot be created or destroyed—only transferred or converted. ΔU = Q − W for a system.
